features.name: class method with invalid signature causing crash
features.description: Code should include a class with a method whose signature contains an unresolvable or invalid type reference that causes the importer to crash instead of producing a proper error

features.name: class inheritance base class not elaborated before child
features.description: Code should include a child class that extends a parent class and references parent class members, where the parent class elaboration is attempted after the child class causing a crash
